parameters.name: sop
parameters.label: SOP
parameters.description: Specifies which Object / contains the geometry you want to fetch.

parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: Only points within the specified group are Fetched. If blank, all points are fetched.

parameters.name: position
parameters.label: Position
parameters.description: When On will retrieve the position attributes (P) from the and create channels tx, ty, tz.

parameters.name: colorrgb
parameters.label: Color RGB
parameters.description: When On will retrieve the RGB color attributes (Cd0, Cd1, Cd2) from the and create channels cr, cg, cb.

parameters.name: coloralpha
parameters.label: Color Alpha
parameters.description: When On will retrieve the Alpha color attribute (Cd4) from the and create channel alpha.

parameters.name: normal
parameters.label: Normal
parameters.description: When On will retrieve the Normal attributes (N) from the and create channels nx, ny, nz.

parameters.name: textureuv
parameters.label: Texture UV
parameters.description: When On will retrieve the UV texture attributes (uv0, uv1) from the and create channels u and v.

parameters.name: texturew
parameters.label: Texture W
parameters.description: When On will retrieve the W texture attribute (uv2) from the and create channel w.

parameters.name: pointindex
parameters.label: Point Index
parameters.description: Turn On to output the point index of each point in the in a channel called index.

parameters.name: normpos
parameters.label: Normal Position XYZ
parameters.description: Turn On

parameters.name: custom
parameters.label: Custom
parameters.description: Turn On to access any attributes in the including Custom by using the two parameters below.

parameters.name: attribscope
parameters.label: Attribute Scope
parameters.description: This selects the custom attributes of the to acquire.

parameters.name: renamescope
parameters.label: Rename Scope
parameters.description: This parameter matches each channel acquired in the Attribute . There must be one name per attribute value. By default, it translates the P attribute (position of the point) to , and channels. You can

parameters.name: transobj
parameters.label: Transform Object
parameters.description: If a transform object is specified, the point values will be represented relative to that object's origin and rotation.

parameters.name: rate
parameters.label: Sample Rate
parameters.description: The sample rate of the channels, in samples per second.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

examples.label: Configure Export Method and Custom
examples.code:
n = op('sopto1')
n.par.exportmethod = 'datname'
n.par.custom = True
n.par.attribscope = 'P'
examples.description: Common settings from 33 real Derivative examples
